narrative:
Lawrence Twp township has 533 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.3 percentage points.
